item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-034","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately brakes with “先不要加第三个 fallback,” identifies that two existing fallbacks plus instability is a red/red-flag state, and demands root-cause evidence before any further fallback. It explicitly says to pause adding fallback, locate the unstable failure mode, collect repro/log evidence, and prefer fixing the main path or test isolation. It does not design or recommend a third fallback; the only conditional mention is framed as after root-cause confirmation and targeted handling, so the fail signal is absent."}
